{{CargoOrgan
|name=Lava Gallbladder
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10810
|idx=11
|description=A gallbladder of purgatory demons. Their food comes from hot lava, and as time goes by, the gallbladder that assists digestion gradually turns into lava.
|skill=
|hp=980
|def=84
|atk=134
|rush=101
|gene1=Per 10k Cells consumed, {race} HP +100
Cells Consumed: 300000/300000
|gene2=Fire RES +30
|gene3=Against Daily Hitmen, {race} HP +200
|gene7=Fire RES +90 (Awakened)
|}}
